post.title: Strong-ends, not weekends!
post.body: 17d  • General 💭Strong-ends, not weekends!A while ago when I was chatting with , and he dropped a crazy perspective that everyone should be thinking about. He mentioned that he doesn’t have "weekends", he has strong-ends 😂I love the idea of using that time to build momentum instead of just recovering from the week. Hope everyone had a great one! Thanks for the reminder in the last post  !

post.title: 🥇Talking about providing value...
post.body: Feb 1  • Money 💰🥇Talking about providing value... Focus on providing as much value as possible and the best way to do that is by following this methodology:1-Pick a specific niche.2-Conduct niche research calls to figure out their most painful percieved problem and their desire outcome.3-Develop the offer and methodology to deliver results (make sure to include their desired outcome, a time frame and a strong guarantee [conditional to them doing the work so you get their full commitment and better results] (you can read $100M Offers by Alex Hor... See more

post.author: Lea Newkirk
post.title: The afterglow
post.body: 3d  • General 💭The afterglow already put his thoughts out, but I couldn’t stay quiet, that call was pure magic. Thank you all for sharing your light, it was a privilege to witness (and share).I’m officially lifting the magic for the week so you can have some actual peace and (you’re welcome). But don’t get too comfortable, consider this a temporary time-out. Next week, we’re going back in, and I need every single one of you ready for action. Thank you very much.HAPPY BEST DAY EVER! 🌟
